title: Tensor dtype system: f16/bf16/f32/f64/i8 element types
goal: Add a real tensor element-dtype system. Today tensors are f64-only, forcing GPU matmul down a ~10x-too-slow f64-softfloat path. Add element dtypes f16, bf16, f32, f64 (default), i8. Surface: (make-tensor dims val :dtype 'f16), (tensor-cast t 'f16), (tensor-dtype t). Store dtype in the tensor header; keep f64 the default so all existing code is unaffected. matmul/tensor-* dispatch on dtype.
acceptance: (tensor-cast t 'f16) round-trips values within f16 precision
